stories.headline: India Seeks to Expand Investment Options for Portfolio Managers
stories.summary: India’s markets regulator has proposed allowing portfolio managers to invest clients’ money in overseas securities and IPO-bound firms, as well as take unhedged equity derivatives positions, as part of a broader easing of rules for the industry.

stories.headline: US Stock Futures Drop as Traders Focus on AI Spending, Oil Jumps
stories.summary: US stock futures retreated as worries over artificial-intelligence spending weighed on sentiment while oil prices closed in on $100 a barrel. Traders braced for more key earnings from Intel Corp., due later in the afternoon.

stories.headline: Alphabet’s Century Bond Has Now Lost a 10th of Its Face Value

stories.headline: JPMorgan Quants Say Strongest Earnings Upgrades Are in Europe
stories.summary: Europe now leads the world as the region with the sharpest upgrades to corporate earnings estimates from analysts, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.

stories.headline: Roche Cuts Generic Impact Estimate, Pointing to More Growth

stories.headline: British woman jailed in Hong Kong for blackmail after accusing banker of rape
